variables.description: Has your child ever had diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA)?

variables.name: GRS
variables.description: Genetic risk score

variables.name: GRS_HLA
variables.description: Component of the T1D Genetic Risk Score (T1D GRS) that is due to 26 SNPs in the HLA region in Table  T1D_GRS_data (aubmitted) SNPs rs6906897 (chr6:29415636) through rs9469341 (chr6:33035877)

variables.name: GnonHLA
variables.description: Component of the T1D Genetic Risk Score (T1D GRS) that is due to SNPs that are not in the HLA region

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: Risk
variables.description: Derived Genetic risk based on Genetic risk score (GRS)
